valle-d-aosta.name: Valle d'Aosta
valle-d-aosta.tagline: Small autonomous region: alpine tourism, hydroelectric energy, traditional craftsmanship.

piemonte.name: Piemonte
piemonte.tagline: Cradle of Italian industry: automotive innovation, world-class wines and mechatronics.
piemonte.whyChoose: Piemonte combines Italy's longest industrial tradition with a strong capacity for transformation. World-class automotive cluster, UNESCO-recognized gastronomic excellence, innovation ecosystem in Torino.

liguria.name: Liguria
liguria.tagline: Gateway to the Mediterranean: ports, shipbuilding and maritime technology.

lombardia.name: Lombardia
lombardia.tagline: Italy's economic engine, financial and industrial capital of the country.
lombardia.whyChoose: Lombardia accounts for 22% of national GDP, hosts the Italian Stock Exchange and over 30% of multinationals headquartered in Italy. Unique entrepreneurial ecosystem, world-class infrastructure, direct access to European markets.

trentino-alto-adige.name: Trentino-Alto Adige
trentino-alto-adige.tagline: Bilingualism, autonomy, excellence in alpine tourism and agri-food supply chains.

districts.name: Apple district (Val di Non, Val Venosta)
districts.description: DOP apples, European leader in production

districts.name: Wood district (Val Pusteria, Val di Fiemme)

veneto.name: Veneto
veneto.tagline: Land of industrial districts and exports, where artisan tradition meets Industry 4.0.

districts.name: Belluno eyewear district
districts.description: Eyewear, world leader in the sector

districts.name: Verona-Treviso wine district
districts.description: DOC and DOCG wines, Prosecco, Amarone

districts.name: Vicenza goldsmithing district
districts.description: Jewelry, gold and precious metals processing

veneto.whyChoose: Veneto is Italy's leading region for per-capita exports. Dense network of specialized SMEs, world-renowned districts, strategic access to Central European markets via the Port of Venezia.

friuli-venezia-giulia.name: Friuli-Venezia Giulia
friuli-venezia-giulia.tagline: Crossroads between Central Europe and the Mediterranean: hub for logistics and shipbuilding.

emilia-romagna.name: Emilia-Romagna
emilia-romagna.tagline: A powerhouse of Italian industry, innovation, and food excellence.
emilia-romagna.whyChoose: Strategic location in the heart of Europe, skilled workforce, solid infrastructure, and a collaborative business culture make Emilia-Romagna one of Italy's most competitive regions.

toscana.name: Toscana
toscana.tagline: Made in Italy excellence: fashion, leather goods, jewelry, and world-class tourism.

districts.name: Leather goods district (Firenze, Scandicci)
districts.description: Luxury leather goods, home to major maisons

toscana.whyChoose: Toscana is synonymous with Made in Italy. Home to major luxury maisons, artisanal districts with centuries-old know-how, recognizable international brands. A unique combination of cultural heritage and industrial capacity.

marche.name: Marche
marche.tagline: Region of districts: footwear, mechanics, furniture, and nautical.

umbria.name: Umbria
umbria.tagline: The green heart of Italy: agri-food, artistic ceramics, and cashmere.

districts.name: Agri-food district (extra virgin olive oil DOP)

lazio.name: Lazio
lazio.tagline: Italy's political and administrative heart: hub for services, research, and aerospace industry.
lazio.whyChoose: Lazio combines political centrality, one of Europe's largest research ecosystems, presence of multinationals, and access to public funds. Roma is a strategic hub for companies working with public institutions, research, and the aerospace sector.

abruzzo.name: Abruzzo
abruzzo.tagline: Between sea and Apennines: automotive, pharmaceuticals, and nature-based tourism.

districts.name: Agri-food district (Montepulciano d'Abruzzo)
districts.description: DOC wines, olive oil, artisanal pasta

molise.name: Molise
molise.tagline: The smallest region in the South: agri-food, artisanal pasta, and tradition.

campania.name: Campania
campania.tagline: Hub of the South: agri-food, aerospace, fashion, and one of the most important port supply chains in the Mediterranean.

districts.name: Tomato district (Salerno, Napoli)
districts.description: Canned tomatoes, San Marzano DOP, agri-food export

campania.whyChoose: Campania offers the Port of Napoli, one of the largest in the Mediterranean, a young workforce, a unique concentration of agri-food excellence, and an aerospace sector of European significance.

puglia.name: Puglia
puglia.tagline: The heel of Italy: agri-food, energy, ICT in Bari, and international tourism.

districts.name: Agri-food district (extra virgin olive oil DOP)

basilicata.name: Basilicata
basilicata.tagline: Between two coasts: extraction, automotive, and cultural tourism (Matera).

districts.name: Extraction district (Val d'Agri)
districts.description: Oil, largest onshore field in the EU

calabria.name: Calabria
calabria.tagline: Tip of the boot: agriculture, coastal tourism, Port of Gioia Tauro.

districts.name: Gioia Tauro logistics hub
districts.description: Largest container port in the central Mediterranean

sicilia.name: Sicilia
sicilia.tagline: Mediterranean crossroads: agri-food, energy, ICT, and quality tourism.

districts.name: Agri-food district (Pachino tomato IGP, citrus)
districts.description: Fruit and vegetables, citrus, Etna DOC wines

sardegna.name: Sardegna
sardegna.tagline: Island of traditions: agro-pastoral, premium tourism, renewable energy.
